fields.name: Live Audio Engineering
fields.description: FOH & Monitor Engineering for concerts, tours, and events.
fields.details:
Front of House (FOH) and Monitor Engineering
Touring support for artists and large-scale events
Expertise with high-end systems like Meyer Sound, EAW, Dante networks, and wireless systems
Operation and programming on industry-leading consoles (DiGiCo, Yamaha Rivage, A&H dLive, Avid S6L)

fields.name: Production Management
fields.description: Tour & event management, logistics, and team coordination.
fields.details:
Full event production planning and execution
Tour management for worship artists and large events (Winter Jam, Stellar Awards, NASCAR shows)
Team coordination, scheduling, and logistics

fields.name: Venue AV Integration
fields.description: Design & install audio, video, and lighting systems.
fields.details:
Design, install, and project manage audio, video, and lighting systems
Special focus on worship environments and multisite expansion
Volunteer team training and systems optimization

fields.name: Media & Creative Direction
fields.description: Service production, video, graphic design, and set design.
fields.details:
Weekly worship service production: audio, lighting, video, set design
Content creation: sermon bumpers, testimonies, announcement videos
Graphic design for services and events

fields.name: Creative & Post-Production
fields.description: Video editing, audio post, and worship media.
fields.details:
Video editing (Final Cut Pro X, Adobe After Effects)
Audio post-production (Adobe Audition)
Graphic design (Photoshop)
Worship lyric/media management (ProPresenter)

fields.name: Technical Consulting & Training
fields.description: System evaluations, workflow optimization, team training.
fields.details:
System evaluations and upgrades
On-site and remote training for technical staff and volunteers
Workflow optimization for churches and live production teams
